title: Dressrosa's Victims Demand Justice
description: Pages 16–16 focus on dressrosa's victims demand justice, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the former toys and underground prisoners rise into the city, while Doflamingo's officers and the Marines struggle to control the chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Any fools who mean to stand against our family can answer to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It doesn't suit him at all!!! Ahahaha- hahahaha!!!
